response.global_analysis: Phonetic match confirmed: The audio contains the first verse of 'Kagerou Daze' by Jin, following an instrumental intro. While the visual remains a static 'Opening Soon' waiting screen (common in stream archives), the vocal track is active. I am discarding the 'Please wait' on-screen text to strictly follow the Golden Rule of prioritizing vocal-driven timing. The segment captures the song from the second line of the first verse through to the sulky dialogue, filling in lyrics missing from the reference JSON via direct audio transcription.

subtitles.original: 病気になりそうなほど眩しい日差しの中
subtitles.english: In the dazzling sunlight that seemed to make you sick

subtitles.original: することもないから君と駄弁っていた
subtitles.english: Having nothing to do, I was chattering with you

subtitles.original: 「でもまぁ夏は嫌いかな」猫を撫でながら
subtitles.english: "But well, I guess I hate summer," while stroking a cat

subtitles.original: 君は不貞腐れたような顔でそんなことを言った
subtitles.english: You said such a thing with a sulky face
